objective: Cherry-pick PR #189 to dev, verify, push. Leave sol review feedback on PRs #197, #195, #194, #193, #192, #191.

workPhases.title: Cherry-pick PR #189 to dev, verify, push, and post review feedback on 6 PRs

tasks.title: Run bun test on affected files (56 pass 0 fail)

criteria.scenario: PR #189 cherry-picked to dev, tests pass, pushed
criteria.expectedEvidence: git log origin/dev showing cherry-pick commit, bun test exit 0
criteria.capturedEvidence: git log origin/dev -1: 9b412d8e fix: preserve configured Alibaba Token Plan base URL (cherry-pick #189). bun test: 56 pass 0 fail 336 expect() calls across provider-registry-parity + router-template-baseurl.

criteria.scenario: Review feedback posted on all 6 new PRs
Each comment includes sol-derived blockers with fix suggestions
criteria.expectedEvidence: Comments contain numbered blockers with file:line refs
criteria.capturedEvidence: All 6 comments include numbered High blockers with specific file:line locations and suggested fixes. #197: 1 blocker (preserve_thinking). #195: 2 blockers (redaction, corrupt-tail). #194: 2 blockers (non-transient soft-avoid, late affinity delete). #193: 1 blocker (port=0 regression). #192: 3 blockers (byte budget, cap bypass, tool recovery). #191: 2 blockers (template persistence, conflicts).
